title: tripleurospermum maritimum subsp. inodorum
intro: Tripleurospermum maritimum subsp. inodorum, also known as sea mayweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of sea mayweed include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and aid in the healing of wounds. Sea mayweed is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
